allow:
Bash(BASE="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anthropics/skills/main/skills/skill-creator"

curl -sL "$BASE/SKILL.md" -o /root/.claude/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md && echo "SKILL.md ok"
curl -sL "$BASE/references/schemas.md" -o /root/.claude/skills/skill-creator/references/schemas.md && echo "schemas.md ok"
curl -sL "$BASE/agents/analyzer.md" -o /root/.claude/skills/skill-creator/agents/analyzer.md && echo "analyzer.md ok"
curl -sL "$BASE/agents/comparator.md" -o /root/.claude/skills/skill-creator/agents/comparator.md && echo "comparator.md ok"
curl -sL "$BASE/agents/grader.md" -o /root/.claude/skills/skill-creator/agents/grader.md && echo "grader.md ok"
curl -sL "$BASE/scripts/__init__.py" -o /root/.claude/skills/skill-creator/scripts/__init__.py && echo "__init__.py ok"
curl -sL "$BASE/scripts/aggregate_benchmark.py" -o /root/.claude/skills/skill-creator/scripts/aggregate_benchmark.py && echo "aggregate_benchmark.py ok"
curl -sL "$BASE/scripts/generate_report.py" -o /root/.claude/skills/skill-creator/scripts/generate_report.py && echo "generate_report.py ok"
curl -sL "$BASE/scripts/improve_description.py" -o /root/.claude/skills/skill-creator/scripts/improve_description.py && echo "improve_description.py ok"
curl -sL "$BASE/scripts/package_skill.py" -o /root/.claude/skills/skill-creator/scripts/package_skill.py && echo "package_skill.py ok"
curl -sL "$BASE/scripts/quick_validate.py" -o /root/.claude/skills/skill-creator/scripts/quick_validate.py && echo "quick_validate.py ok"
curl -sL "$BASE/scripts/run_eval.py" -o /root/.claude/skills/skill-creator/scripts/run_eval.py && echo "run_eval.py ok"
curl -sL "$BASE/scripts/run_loop.py" -o /root/.claude/skills/skill-creator/scripts/run_loop.py && echo "run_loop.py ok"
curl -sL "$BASE/scripts/utils.py" -o /root/.claude/skills/skill-creator/scripts/utils.py && echo "utils.py ok")

Bash(cp -r /mnt/c/repos/global66-skills/skills/global66-java-dev/* /root/.gemini/skills/global66-java-dev/ && echo "Synced to Gemini CLI" && wc -l /root/.gemini/skills/global66-java-dev/SKILL.md && ls /root/.gemini/skills/global66-java-dev/references/)
